The '''Duuvhals''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Yashuvhu/Legends|Yashuvhu]]. They were warm-blooded reptiles covered by green feathers. Their anatomy offered them significant ability to disguise and be unseen in the rainforests of their homeworld. Considered fast for their size, duuvhals did not commonly attack creatures other than natural prey. Duuvhals also had venomous fangs which could kill [[Human/Legends|Humans]].

Though normally found in the wild, duuvhals could be domesticated. Some of the [[Yashuvhi]] kept them as pets, even being trained to bite on command. [[Force Adept]] and wanderer [[Valara Saar]] had a pet Duuvhal named [[Zeev]]. After Zeev died on [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]], she took a second pet duuvhal, [[Jedi (duuvhal)|Jedi]], upon her return to Yashuvhi.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{Mo}}
